myRouter.navigate('home', {trigger: true});

commands.description: Updates model attributes without triggering the 'change' or 'set' events, useful for batch updates to prevent excessive re-renders.
Fetches data from the server and replaces the entire collection with the new data, triggering a 'reset' event.
Uses listenTo instead of on to ensure the view automatically unbinds its listener when the view is removed, preventing memory leaks.
A pattern used with custom sync methods to send only the changed attributes to the server rather than the entire model.
Removes the view's element from the DOM and unbinds all events (including delegated events) to ensure proper garbage collection.
